subject: Re: Vectrix evaluation — Meridian Health Systems

messages.subject: Vectrix evaluation — Meridian Health Systems
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I'm Alan Fong, VP of Engineering at Meridian Health Systems. We found Vectrix through a Hacker News thread earlier this week and I've been exploring the platform for the last few days.

We run 85+ production APIs supporting clinical data workflows. We're currently using a combination of Datadog and in-house tooling for API monitoring, and neither is giving us the endpoint-level anomaly detection we need.

Before I escalate this internally, I want to understand a few things:
1. Data residency — we have strict requirements that all data stay in US-based infrastructure.
2. SSO — we're on Okta and would need SAML integration.
3. Audit trail / retention — our compliance team requires 12-month data retention.
4. SOC 2 status.

If those four are addressable, I'd like to set up a call.

— Dr. Alan Fong
VP Engineering, Meridian Health Systems

messages.subject: Re: Vectrix evaluation — Meridian Health Systems
messages.body:
Dr. Fong,

Thank you for reaching out. I'm glad you found us through HN — and your four requirements are exactly the right questions to ask.

Quick answers:
1. Data residency: All data stored and processed in AWS us-east-1 and us-west-2 (US only). No data leaves the US.
2. SSO: We're mid-migration to Clerk, which supports SAML 2.0 and Okta integration natively. We can have SSO configured for your org within 30 days of contract.
3. 12-month retention: Our standard retention is 90 days raw events. However, we support custom retention contracts for Enterprise — we've designed our infrastructure with per-org retention in mind (in development, targeting March 1).
4. SOC 2: We hold SOC 2 Type I (issued October 2025). Type II audit is committed for Q2 2026.

I'd love to set up a call this week or next. Tessa Moreno (CC'd), our Head of Sales, will reach out to find a time.

— Priya Chandran
CEO, Vectrix Labs

messages.subject: Vectrix Security Questionnaire — responses attached
messages.body:
Dear Rachel,

Thank you for sending over Meridian's vendor security questionnaire (147 questions). I'm attaching our initial responses. We've completed approximately 60% of the questionnaire; the remaining questions (primarily SOC 2 controls evidence and detailed encryption specifics) are in progress and will be completed by February 14.

A few items I want to flag proactively:
- Q47 (SLA Credits): Our standard policy caps credits at 30% of monthly fee. We're aware this is below typical enterprise requirements and Priya is reviewing options.
- Q61 (ClickHouse subprocessor): Our analytics database runs on ClickHouse Cloud, which uses AWS us-east-1 as its underlying infrastructure.
- Q3 (SOC 2 Type II): We hold Type I. Type II audit is committed for completion by June 30, 2026.

Please let me know if you have questions.

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
